calendar.matters:
JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-26-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Wallace P. Douglass, Clerk: Juanita Murphy, matter not reported.

Michael S. Rossoff, Esq., for Swords to Plowshares, a California Corporation.
Michael Brown sworn and examined of behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by Defendant Joseph Tormos.
Planitiff to file a dismissal of Does 1-10.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1030 Girard Road, #302A, San Francisco, CA 94129.
Per Diem Damages $1,141.55
Pre-judgment interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs waived
for a Total Judgment of $1,141.55.
Judgment signed in open court.

CONTINUANCE CALENDAR FOR UD JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-26-2014 Assigned To Trial Court
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Michael Rossoff, Esq., (415-863-7100), for Swords To Plowshares, Plaintiff.
Michael Brown, Property Manager of Swords To Plowshares.
Defendant in pro per JOSEPH TORMOS DID NOT APPEAR.

10:00am This matter comes on calendar on this date, having been continued from November 24, 2014 at 10:00am as ordered by Court, for TRIAL CALL CONTINUANCE. Plaintiff's property manager and its counsel are present. Defendant Joseph Tormos is not present.

10:15am Court calls the calendar. Plaintiff's property manager and its counsel are present. Defendant Joseph Tormos is still not present. Court orders this case be assigned to Judge Douglass, Dept. 624, forthwith, for JURY TRIAL.

Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Nov-24-2014 Continued To Nov-26-14 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Michael Rossoff, Esq., (415-863-7188), for Swords To Plowshares, Plaintiff.
Joseph Tormos, Defendant in pro per, (415-347-4497).

In open court, Defendant is taken in custody by bailiffs per Order of the Court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Peggy Tsujimoto, (415-828-1919), D501.

At 1:35pm, Order To Show Cause Re Contempt hearing is held. Court having heard oral responses rules as follows: Defendant Joseph Tormos is not found in contempt. Defendant is to be released from commitment in jail. Order is signed after the hearing. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Reporter Sonia Wong, CSR #11288, (415-551-3748), D501.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Quidachay; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Swords To Plowshares is present. Represented by Michael Brown.
Attorney Michael Rossoff for the plaintiff.
Defendant Joseph Tormos DID NOT APPEAR.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of NOV-24-2014 remains on calendar. (D501)
